fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track the VIX index, making it a tool for hedging against market uncertainty or for short-term speculation on volatility. Recent articles highlight its role as a potential surrogate for S&P 500 bear positions and a unique hedging instrument. However, the leveraged nature and contango effects inherent in VIX futures mean that "good things do not last" for long-term holders, suggesting its utility is primarily for short-term tactical plays rather than buy-and-hold strategies.
